name: Decipher AI
description: AI agent that watches session replays using vision LMs to surface UX bugs, generate E2E tests and monitor live user failures in production.

seo.title: Decipher AI — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: Decipher AI: AI agent that watches session replays using vision LMs to surface UX bugs, generate E2E tests and monitor live user failures in production.

when_to_use: AI vision agent watching session replays for UX bugs
Auto-generate E2E tests from observed user interactions
Monitor live production sessions for failure patterns
Surface user friction without manual replay review

pros: Vision LLM watches replays so humans don't scrub timelines
Auto-generates E2E tests from real user flows
Surfaces UX bugs that passive error tracking misses
cons: LLM-based analysis costs scale with session volume
Vision models still hallucinate on complex flows
Enterprise privacy review is harder with vision AI
review.verdict: Promising AI replay watcher that turns sessions into tests and bug reports, if you trust vision LLMs on prod data.
review.best_for: Lean dev teams wanting AI to triage UX bugs and seed regression tests.
review.not_for: Regulated enterprises with strict constraints on shipping session pixels to LLMs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
